headline: PPG named in Newsweek’s America’s Most Charitable Companies 2026 list
summary: PITTSBURGH, March 11, 2026--PPG (NYSE:PPG) today announced its inclusion in the inaugural Newsweek America’s Most Charitable Companies 2026 list, presented in partnership with Statista. Being recognized in this list signifies industry leadership in corporate philanthropy, supporting communities, championing causes, and giving back in ways that create real and lasting impact.

headline: PPG Aquacron WSP Launched With Benchmark Curability and Sustainability
summary: PPG unveils Aquacron WSP waterborne shop primer for structural steel, curing in as little as 2 minutes with low VOCs to boost throughput and meet regulations.

headline: A Look At PPG Industries (PPG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: PPG Industries Stock Reaction: What Recent Returns Suggest PPG Industries (PPG) has seen mixed share performance recently, with a 2.2% decline over the past day and a 10.4% decline over the past week, leaving the stock down 16.3% over the past month. At a last close of $105.85, PPG is modestly higher over the past 3 months, with a 5.4% total return. Longer horizons show weaker results, including a 4.2% total return decline over the past year and a 19.2% total return decline over 5...
